commands.repair_reason: The PR has a protected maintainer label and missing contributor proof, so it needs human handling even though the code blocker itself is narrow.; Needs attention: The PR introduces a trust-boundary CLI path that can accept malformed verification envelopes as successful.; Review finding: [P1] Validate the full verification envelope before passing — src/cli/skills-cli.ts:121 (sha=fb8a43a3e312e75aa0aa26378dd82cdae0675a7e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `openclaw skills verify <slug>` with ClawHub `/verify` and `--card` output, installed-skill target resolution, tests, and docs.

PR surface: Source +417, Tests +936, Docs +31. Total +1384 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: a `/verify` response shaped as `{ ok: true, decision: "pass" }` but missing or changing `schema` and required envelope fields will pass `shouldFailSkillVerification`. I did not execute the PR branch because the checkout is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR has a protected maintainer label and missing contributor proof, so it needs human handling even though the code blocker itself is narrow.

target.title: Add ClawHub skill verification CLI
target.body:
## Summary
- adds `openclaw skills verify <slug>` backed by ClawHub `/verify`, with JSON output by default and no redundant `--json` flag
- resolves installed ClawHub skill targets from installer-owned lock/origin metadata, with `--version`, `--tag`, shared/global workspace, and uninstalled registry verification paths
- adds `--card` Markdown output that follows the verified `card.url`, caps card downloads, and fails closed on malformed trust envelopes
- documents the new command and the generated `skill-card.md` hashing behavior

## Linear
- CLAW-179 root
- CLAW-180, CLAW-181, CLAW-182, CLAW-183, CLAW-184
- CLAW-186 tracks the ClawHub CLI cleanup to remove its redundant `--json` flag

## Tests
- `CI=true pnpm test src/infra/clawhub.test.ts src/agents/skills-clawhub.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.commands.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.verify.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `CI=true pnpm check:changed`
- `CI=true pnpm format:docs:check`
- `git diff --check`

## Review
- autoreview accepted findings fixed: verified card URL binding, missing card metadata, card byte cap, release-owned changelog removal, fail-closed malformed decisions, and lockfile-corroborated installed origin metadata
- final autoreview retry exited abnormally with no output after the last accepted finding was fixed; local tests and manual follow-up review passed
target.author: patrick-erichsen
